summary: A solid Spring ’88 audience recording that captures a hot Uranium Blues and a very powerful Stella Blue.
review: Both reviewers praise this typical late‑80s show, highlighting the scorching “Uranium Blues” and an especially moving “Stella Blue.” The audience pull is noted as full and pleasant, making the set enjoyable despite being a non‑soundboard source. Overall it’s seen as a strong entry in the spring Kaiser run.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently positive comments (4‑ and 5‑star) focus on good performance and a decent full audience recording; weighting the strong show (70%) and solid audio (30%) yields an overall rating above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Full audience pull with clear enough sound to enjoy the performance; no major flaws reported, though typical crowd ambience present.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Typical late‑80s set that flows well and showcases the band's tight playing; regarded as a solid representation of the era.
